title: Emi Gamestages Intergration
description: adds clear visual indicators in EMI so players can instantly see which items and recipes are locked behind GameStages.
body:
EMI GameStages Link adds clear visual indicators in EMI so players can instantly see which items and recipes are locked behind GameStages.
​
![Shows the Locks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/105cfce6202dc1d68ed46be19230d2c869e4bf13_0.webp)

Overview
EMI GameStages Link is a Minecraft Forge mod that integrates EMI with GameStages to display lock info directly inside EMI’s item list and recipe screens.
​
If an item or recipe is stage-locked, the mod can show a lock icon overlay, a “Locked to <stage>” label, tooltip details, and a colored highlight on locked outputs.
​

Features
- Automatic ItemStages integration (detects locked items with no config).
- Automatic RecipeStages integration (detects locked recipes with no config).
- Lock icon overlay on locked items/outputs.​
- “Locked to <stage>” label above locked recipes.
- Tooltip info showing the required stage on hover.​
- Highlight locked output slots (configurable color).
- EMI item list integration (lock icons in EMI search/item list panels).
- Manual lock config via item IDs or tags as a fallback/extension.
​
